principles.name: Think Before Coding

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Minimal changes — copy templates, update one line in install.sh, fill docs

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: Only touched files listed in plan; one opportunistic bugfix (latent TypeError)

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: Each task had explicit verify commands; E2E test caught cp destination bug

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers
